whyHighRisk: DB schema (prisma/schema.prisma FinancialReport model) has NO availabilityDate, filingDate, or releaseDate field
Without a PIT-safe gate field, any FinancialReport query would implicitly use all data up to query time (look-ahead contamination)
P26C identified this gap and drafted a paper-only availabilityDate contract v0
No production integration exists; data was manually imported with no date governance
sources.pitRisk: HIGH — using periodEndDate or fiscalQuarter as proxy for availability is incorrect; MOPS filing dates can be weeks or months after the reporting period ends
sources.leakageRisk: HIGH — a Q1 report (Jan-Mar period) is not filed until ~May 15; using the period end date Mar 31 as the asOf gate would leak the report into predictions made before May 15
sources.sourceAcquisitionBlocker: No systematic download from MOPS; no filingDate captured in DB schema
minimumEvidenceToUpgrade: Add filingDate (or availabilityDate) column to FinancialReport Prisma schema
Backfill filingDate from MOPS for existing DB rows
Verify that filingDate <= asOfDate gate works for at least 2 quarters of historical data
Update P29A registry entry to SOURCE_PRESENT_AWAITING_VALIDATION
Explicit CTO approval token to upgrade to AVAILABLE_NEEDS_VALIDATION
evidenceFiles: prisma/schema.prisma (model FinancialReport — no date gate field)

whyHighRisk: DB schema has publishedAt but EventIngestionService shows it may default to ingest time when source doesn't provide a reliable timestamp
Mock events (sourceType='mock') are currently mixed with RSS events in the live ingestion path
No verificationStatus or sourceUrl field for audit trail
trustLevel field exists (official/mainstream/secondary/unknown) but not all RSS sources have verified publishedAt
P26B established the contract rule (publishedAt <= asOfDate, ingestedAt forbidden) but did not verify all current event rows comply
sources.pitRisk: HIGH — if publishedAt defaults to ingestedAt (system ingestion time), historical replay using asOfDate-gated queries would see events that were ingested after asOf but whose publishedAt was set to ingest time
sources.leakageRisk: MEDIUM-HIGH — post-announcement events (e.g., market reaction analysis, analyst reports) may have publishedAt close to ingest time rather than event time
sources.sourceAcquisitionBlocker: No separation of mock vs. verified-real events; publishedAt reliability not audited across all current DB rows
minimumEvidenceToUpgrade: Audit all existing NewsEvent rows: how many have publishedAt != ingestedAt (within 60 seconds)?
Separate mock events from RSS events in DB (or add sourceType='mock' exclusion to PIT queries)
For official company announcements: use TWSE/MOPS announcement date as authoritative publishedAt
Dry-run import of manually curated event CSV with verified publishedAt
Update P29A registry entry to SOURCE_PRESENT_AWAITING_VALIDATION
Explicit CTO approval token to upgrade to AVAILABLE_NEEDS_VALIDATION

disclaimer: Research analysis only. Not investment advice.
